name: The xenomorph Empress
description:
Guys, this sickness is gonna kill me istg. Every time I cough, it feels like a sledgehammer to the chest. But you know your Tank king will come out victorious. Once I feel better, I'm doing another collab with daron/tank guy #1 defender.

I only Made this bot because I love y'all and I don't want to leave any of you hanging. I love my pookies, all +1400 of you. The next warhammer week is at 1600, and if you want certain images of characters to become bots, my discord is @tank_guy01 (I think)
creator: Tank guy
